primary_clean_same_bar.reason: Robust, regime-dependent, interior Track-A C-D frontier without max-inventory corner.

exploratory_war_raw_headroom.reason: Largest robust checked static spread, but not clean for Pareto/resource-efficiency claims because severe uses S3_I1344.

not_primary.reason: Single-seed war peak suggested high headroom, but available confirm panels show increased-regime optimum at S3_I1344.
Valid alternative under stricter off-saturation gate, but it adds demand and stochastic PT before exhausting simpler risk-only C-D same-bar cell.

claim_boundary.primary_lane: Cobb-Douglas same-bar dynamic-vs-static under a clean war-stress extension.
claim_boundary.exploratory_lane: Higher-stress military scenario to test maximum headroom.
claim_boundary.excel_ret: Secondary continuity metric, not the primary same-bar metric in the C-D lane.
